codeReview.summary: The commit restores the shared-schema/tool-schema type surface to a typecheck-clean state and keeps runtime behavior intact (including explicit handling of optional planning fields at the tool boundary). No actionable correctness bugs were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The core-worker procedure requires `bun run lint` and `bun run deadcode` to exit 0, but this feature was marked successful while both exited 1 due pre-existing baseline debt. The skill needs explicit guidance for handling known baseline validator failures without creating ambiguity.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/vriesd/projects/flow-opencode/.factory/skills/core-worker/SKILL.md:56-57 require lint/deadcode to exit 0; /Users/vriesd/.factory/missions/34ec2e58-6360-41eb-aaf2-3aba539ddf02/handoffs/2026-04-18T11-45-51-314Z__m1-fix-typecheck-regression__c8a82654-835a-4423-ba63-70f4c723dcff.json:36-37 and :46-47 record exitCode 1 for both commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared state did not document the pre-existing lint/deadcode baseline issues, so workers had to rediscover and re-justify them during feature verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/vriesd/.factory/missions/34ec2e58-6360-41eb-aaf2-3aba539ddf02/AGENTS.md:73-75 says no known pre-existing issues; the same handoff above records pre-existing lint/deadcode failures in verification and discoveredIssues.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill instructions, and commit 360adb8486af2eb1f18820e2eadc32129a6c61b9.
